allow: Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/--text-hero: clamp\(2\\.25rem, 4vw, 3\\.5rem\);/--text-hero: clamp\(2.75rem, 5vw, 4.5rem\);/' -e 's/--text-h1: clamp\(1\\.875rem, 3vw, 2\\.75rem\);/--text-h1: clamp\(2rem, 3.5vw, 3.25rem\);/' -e 's/--text-h2: clamp\(1\\.5rem, 2\\.25vw, 2rem\);/--text-h2: clamp\(1.625rem, 2.5vw, 2.25rem\);/' -e 's/--text-h3: clamp\(1\\.125rem, 1\\.5vw, 1\\.375rem\);/--text-h3: clamp\(1.25rem, 1.8vw, 1.5rem\);/' -e 's/--text-subtitle: clamp\(0\\.8125rem, 0\\.85vw, 0\\.875rem\);/--text-subtitle: clamp\(0.8125rem, 0.9vw, 0.875rem\);/' -e 's/--text-body: clamp\(1rem, 1\\.1vw, 1\\.125rem\);/--text-body: clamp\(1rem, 1.15vw, 1.125rem\);/' -e 's/--lh-heading: 1\\.25;/--lh-heading: 1.2;/' -e 's/--lh-body: 1\\.85;/--lh-body: 1.8;/' -e 's/--space-3xl: 12rem;/--space-3xl: 10rem;/' -e 's/--container-max: 1400px;/--container-max: 1600px;/' -e 's/--container-narrow: 800px;/--container-narrow: 780px;/' -e 's/--container-pad: clamp\(1\\.5rem, 5vw, 4rem\);/--container-pad: clamp\(1.5rem, 5vw, 5rem\);/' -e 's/--ease-smooth: cubic-bezier\(0\\.25, 0\\.1, 0\\.25, 1\);/--ease-smooth: cubic-bezier\(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1\);\\n      --ease-spring: cubic-bezier\(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1\);/' -e 's/--ls-medium: 0\\.12em;/--ls-medium: 0.12em;\\n      --ls-slight: 0.03em;/' "$f")
